styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents

cases.prompt_body: Rear three-quarter Therac-25 treatment room just after exposure, camera placed below any arm label plane, off-white treatment head and table remain calm and canonical, a plain white sheet carries one narrow overbright heat-scorch line at torso level while the machine posture stays routine, no patient body visible, no readable labels or console UI, pale beige walls, charcoal floor shadow, clinical fluorescent light
